_meta.name: OUTRAGE — Meme Generation
_meta.description: Triggered from Meme Studio or high-scoring clusters. Uses imgflip + OpenAI to generate meme captions. POSTs to /api/webhooks/meme.

nodes.name: Load Active Meme Templates
nodes._comment: Pick least-used templates to avoid repetition
